candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; clearly the reported total revenue.

candidates.why: Standard direct cost line matching cost of goods sold / cost of sales.

Clear SG&A overhead component.

Capitalized offset/adjustment, not the primary reported R&D expense.

candidates.why: Best match for reported interest expense.
Specific subcomponent of interest expense, not preferred over the broader reported line.

candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest subcomponent, not preferred over the broader reported line.

candidates.why: Balancing/derived line, not preferred when the main reported interest expense line exists.

Balancing item, not preferred.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of AB Volvo

candidates.row_label: Total Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest

variables.notes: Used balance sheet NCI labels as a priority list; BE uses owner equity so MIB can be added without double counting.
